title: Special Court closes ED case against former Haryana CM Bhupinder Hooda, AJL over Panchkula land allotment
description: A special court in Panchkula on Friday discharged former Haryana Chief Minister Bhupinder Singh Hooda and Associated Journals Limited (AJL) in a money laundering case linked to the re-allotment of a plot in Panchkula.Special Judge Rajeev Goyal closed the Enforcement Directorate’s (ED) case against them in light of the recent discharge in the predicate offence which was investigated by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI).A detailed copy of the order is awaited.The order follows a February 2
